articles.title: Feed Machinery Industry Trends in 2024
articles.summary: With the advancement of large-scale farming and smart agriculture, the feed machinery industry is transforming towards intelligence, greenization and large-scale production.
articles.content:
As an important support for modern animal husbandry and aquaculture, the development level of feed machinery directly affects the quality, cost and safety of feed products. In 2024, against the background of continuous promotion of large-scale farming, increasing concentration of feed enterprises and increasingly strict environmental protection requirements, the feed machinery industry shows the following major development trends.

1. Accelerated Integration of Intelligence and Digitalization

More and more feed enterprises are introducing PLC control systems, MES manufacturing execution systems and remote operation and maintenance platforms. From batching, mixing, crushing to packaging, the whole process is traceable, significantly improving production efficiency and product quality stability. In the future, AI-assisted formula optimization and equipment fault prediction will become new competitive focuses.

2. Green Environmental Protection Becomes a Hard Indicator

Dust, noise and energy consumption are three major environmental challenges that feed mills have long faced. High-efficiency dust removal equipment such as pulse jet bag filters and Venturi dust collectors continues to grow in demand; at the same time, low-energy hammer mills and high-efficiency mixers are also favored by the market. Meeting national environmental emission standards has become a basic prerequisite for feed enterprises when selecting equipment.

3. Rising Demand for Specialization and Customization

Different animal species and growth stages have different requirements for feed nutritional ratio and processing technology. Special equipment markets such as premix units, aquatic feed extrusion lines and pet food production lines continue to expand. Equipment manufacturers need stronger solution design and engineering delivery capabilities.

4. Conclusion

Aoshihua Machinery always keeps up with industry development trends, continuously increases R&D investment, and is committed to providing customers with more intelligent, more environmentally friendly and more efficient feed machinery solutions.

articles.title: How to Scientifically Select a Hammer Mill for Feed Mills?
articles.summary: Hammer mill is a core equipment in feed processing. Selection should comprehensively consider raw material characteristics, capacity requirements, grinding fineness and energy consumption.
articles.content:
Hammer mill is one of the key equipment in formula feed production lines with high investment proportion and energy consumption. Scientific and reasonable selection not only affects production efficiency and product quality, but also relates to later maintenance costs and energy consumption levels. This article summarizes the key points of selection from several core dimensions.

1. Clarify Raw Material Characteristics

Different raw materials vary greatly in hardness, fiber content and moisture content. Conventional raw materials such as corn and soybean meal are suitable for conventional SFSP hammer mills; while raw materials with high fiber content such as straw and distiller's grains require models with greater power and better wear resistance.

2. Match Capacity and Fineness Requirements

Livestock and poultry feed generally requires grinding particle size of 2.5-4mm, while aquatic feed and pet feed require finer grinding. When selecting, appropriate rotor diameter, screen area and matching power should be selected according to target capacity and grinding fineness to avoid over-capacity or overload operation.

3. Pay Attention to Energy Consumption and Wear Parts Life

The grinding process usually accounts for more than 30% of the total energy consumption of feed processing. Water-drop grinding chamber and rotor design with optimized tip speed can effectively improve grinding efficiency. At the same time, hammers and screens as wear parts, their material and replacement convenience should also be considered.

4. Supporting Dust Removal and Safety

It is recommended to equip hammer mills with pulse dust collectors or permanent magnet cylinders to reduce dust overflow and protect workshop environment and employee health. At the same time, pay attention to overload protection, safety interlocks and other designs.

Conclusion

Aoshihua Machinery provides various specifications of hammer mills and grinding system solutions. Welcome to call or consult online, and we will recommend the optimal solution according to your actual needs.

articles.title: Aoshihua Machinery Launches Upgraded SLH Stainless Steel Premix Unit
articles.summary: To meet the production needs of high-end premix and additives, Aoshihua Machinery has fully upgraded the SLH series, significantly improving mixing accuracy and cleanliness.
articles.content:
Recently, Aoshihua Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd. officially launched the newly upgraded SLH stainless steel premix unit. Based on the original design, this series has undergone a number of technical optimizations, further improving the equipment's mixing accuracy, cleaning convenience and operation stability.

Upgrade Highlights

  • Full 304 Stainless Steel Contact Surfaces: Effectively avoids secondary contamination of materials, meeting high-standard production requirements for high-end premix, vitamins and enzymes.
  • Improved Micro-Batching Accuracy: Adopts high-sensitivity weighing sensors and intelligent compensation algorithms, achieving batching accuracy of ±0.1%.
  • Quick-Disassembly Structure Design: Key components such as mixers, silos and conveying pipes can be quickly disassembled for more efficient cleaning and maintenance.
  • Dust-Free Feeding Station: Integrated dust removal system improves workshop operating environment and reduces dust explosion risks.

Application Prospects

As the feed additive industry's requirements for product quality and safety continue to increase, the SLH stainless steel premix unit will become an ideal choice for bio-feed, high-end livestock and poultry premix and aquatic premix production enterprises.

Conclusion

Aoshihua Machinery will continue to be customer-centric, constantly launching better products and services, and helping the high-quality development of the feed industry.

articles.title: Dust Control Solutions and Practices in Feed Mills
articles.summary: Dust not only affects the workshop environment but also poses safety hazards. Scientific dust removal solutions are an important guarantee for green production in feed mills.
articles.content:
During feed processing, a large amount of dust is generated in raw material conveying, grinding, mixing, packaging and other links. Long-term high-concentration dust environments not only affect employee health but also pose dust explosion hazards. Therefore, scientific and effective dust control is a topic that feed mills must pay attention to.

Common Dust Generation Points

  • Raw material feeding inlet
  • Hammer mill discharge outlet
  • Mixer breathing port
  • Finished product packaging port
  • Silo top ventilation port

Dust Removal Solution Selection

According to different dust characteristics, pulse jet bag filters or wet Venturi dust collectors can be selected. Bag filters have high dust removal efficiency and low operating costs, suitable for conventional feed dust; wet dust collectors are suitable for high-temperature, high-humidity or flammable/explosive dust conditions.

Key Points of Dust Removal System Design

Reasonable design of air volume, duct air velocity and filtration area is the key to ensuring dust removal effect. At the same time, filter bags should be cleaned regularly and pulse valves inspected to ensure long-term stable system operation.

Conclusion

Aoshihua Machinery provides full-process dust control solutions for feed mills, from solution design to equipment installation and commissioning, providing customers with one-stop services.

articles.title: Why Has the Twin-Shaft Paddle Mixer Become the First Choice for Feed Mills?
articles.summary: With advantages such as short mixing time, high uniformity and low residue, twin-shaft paddle mixers have become standard equipment in modern feed production lines.
articles.content:
Mixing is one of the key processes in feed processing that determines product quality. Mixing uniformity directly affects animals' nutrient intake. Among many mixing equipment, twin-shaft paddle mixers have become the first choice for modern feed mills due to their unique advantages.

Working Principle

The twin-shaft paddle mixer consists of two counter-rotating paddle shafts with paddles arranged at specific angles. Materials in the machine are simultaneously subjected to convection, shear, diffusion and other actions, quickly achieving uniform mixing.

Core Advantages

  • Short Mixing Time: Single batch mixing time is usually only 30-90 seconds, much higher production efficiency than traditional ribbon mixers.
  • High Mixing Uniformity: The coefficient of variation CV can be controlled within 5%, meeting the requirements of formula feed production.
  • Low Residue: Large-opening discharge design, residue is usually less than 0.3%, reducing cross-contamination.
  • Friendly to Liquid Addition: Can be equipped with spraying system to evenly add oil, molasses and other liquids during mixing.

Selection Suggestions

When selecting, the mixer volume and matching power should be determined according to production line capacity, material characteristics and mixing batch requirements. Aoshihua Machinery SWH series twin-shaft paddle mixers provide various specifications to meet the needs of feed mills of different scales.
